data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. All 6 acceptance criteria met: owner metadata queryable via StepOwner on all view/API surfaces, artifact specs defined in workflow schemas and exposed in StepMetadata.output, review hints attached per-state and visible in responses, metadata persists through all mutation paths (create/update/state_ops) into knot_head events, README+CONTRIBUTING document the JSON contract for downstream consumers, and 16 tests across 5 workflow patterns (autopilot, semiauto, custom bundle, gate, lease) including 3 dedicated response-level tests. make sanity passes: 809 tests, 0 failures, 95.10% coverage. No security concerns, fully backwards compatible, all code size limits respected.
